title: EQ - Tab is present in Device Settings
scenario: EQ tab is present in Device Settings screen when using a supported Poly device
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. On the Home screen, tap on the connected Poly device name to open Device Settings.
3. In Device Settings, locate and tap on Audio Settings.
4. Within Audio Settings, verify that the Equalizer (EQ) tab is visible and accessible.
expected: The Equalizer (EQ) tab is present and accessible in the Audio Settings section of Device Settings for a supported Poly device.
